summary: Replay ADR 0370 from the latest realistic 0.178.140 origin/main base, finish the remaining shared lifecycle helper adoption and fresh-worktree local-overlay repairs, rerun LiveKit from the merged main candidate on runtime-comms, and carry the verified result into integrated repo and platform version 0.178.141.

verification.check: Focused ws-0370 regression slice on the exact-main integration tree
verification.observed: `pytest -q tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py tests/test_livekit_runtime_role.py` passed with `20 passed in 0.22s`; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-pytest-r1-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: LiveKit syntax validation and fresh-worktree generated platform vars
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-livekit` passed, and `make generate-platform-vars` regenerated `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` with the real `.local` identity overlay applied; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-syntax-livekit-r1-0.178.141.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-generate-platform-vars-r2-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main LiveKit replay and public room lifecycle verification
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=livekit env=production` completed cleanly from the merged main candidate, including controller-side public room lifecycle verification; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-livekit-live-apply-r2-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: Direct repository gate bundle on the integrated candidate
verification.observed: The direct repo gates passed from the integrated candidate; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-final-repo-gates-r1-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: Live-apply receipt validation and whitespace diff check
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` and `git diff --check` passed; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-final-live-apply-receipts-r1-0.178.141.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-final-git-diff-check-r1-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: Build-server reachability and remote validate path
verification.observed: `./scripts/remote_exec.sh check-build-server` and `make remote-validate` passed from the integrated candidate; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-final-check-build-server-r1-0.178.141.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-final-remote-validate-r1-0.178.141.txt`.

notes: The exact-main replay started from origin/main@3cb78f677e3ed6b0f3343c86085c405fdecac8d9, the latest realistic reachable mainline revision with repo version 0.178.140 and platform version 0.178.138 at apply time.

Fresh-worktree generated surfaces initially replayed committed example.com placeholders until the platform vars generator re-applied the ignored .local identity overlay. That repair was required for truthful LiveKit, TLS, and edge-publication replay from a separate worktree.

The integrated closeout updates VERSION, RELEASE.md, docs/release-notes/0.178.141.md, README.md, versions/stack.yaml, the archived ws-0370 workstream metadata, and this receipt so repo version 0.178.141 and platform version 0.178.141 describe the same verified state.
